subject: BLOCKER: AUDIT_LOGIN credentials missing — V2 authenticated screenshot task halted at PRE-DISPATCH item 4 per §4 Step A; CLA Lane_01 to provision test account + credentials before re-dispatch
body: Task LANE01-UZG-PLUS-V2-AUTHENTICATED-SCREENSHOTS-V1 halted at PRE-DISPATCH VERIFY item 4. Inspected three .env.local locations (Uniton_Shared, UZGPLUS, Uniton_OS) using Select-String key-existence test (KL-02 + §13 security gate compliant — values never read or echoed). All four canonical key names absent in all three locations: AUDIT_LOGIN_EMAIL, AUDIT_LOGIN_OTP_BYPASS, AUDIT_LOGIN_OTP_CODE, AUDIT_LOGIN_PASSWORD. Defensive alternative-naming scan against pattern (LOGIN|AUTH|TEST|PLAYWRIGHT|E2E|ADMIN|OTP|EMAIL|AUDIT|CRED|PASS|USER) found only NTS_EMAIL (rejected per §13 item 5 — must not use NTS personal account) and SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD (rejected — DB-tier, not application login). Per task instruction R-NTS-LLM-02 cannot ask NTS directly for credentials; escalating via this handoff to CLA Lane_01. No screenshots captured (0/100 target). Pre-flight items 1, 2, 3, 6 passed (workspace clean, gh auth ok, uzg.plus 200 OK). Pre-flight item 5 (Playwright installable) deferred since not reached. Authored 3 halt-state DOT deliverables (snapshot HALTED_AWAITING_CREDENTIALS, halt report, audit log) + this escalation handoff. Branch feat/LANE01-uzg-plus-v2-authenticated-screenshots-v1 will be merged via self-merge --admin to land halt evidence on origin/main and Live mirror. Boundary checks all PASS (no canon/uzgplus-app/Phase 1 audit modifications). Security gate all PASS (no credentials read, no PII captured, no admin actions). Once credentials supplied, Cursor can resume from Step 4 (script update) + Steps 5-22 (capture pipeline). Estimated re-execution time ~2-3h since Playwright harness scripts/audit/screenshot_v2.mjs already authored (257 lines) from prior task LANE01-UZG-PLUS-V2-USER-FLOW-AUDIT-V1.
requested_action: 1. Provision a dedicated test account on https://uzg.plus (NOT NTS personal — separate disposable email like audit-cursor-2026@<test-domain>); complete signup + onboarding so journey gates have populated progress. 2. Coordinate with Lane_03 to add a deterministic OTP bypass for the test account: either (a) backend dev-only route that returns a fixed 6-digit code, OR (b) a magic-link with persistent token, OR (c) a fixed-OTP record for that specific email in dev mode. 3. Add credentials to C:\workspace\Uniton_Shared\.env.local with keys AUDIT_LOGIN_EMAIL=<email> + one of {AUDIT_LOGIN_OTP_BYPASS=<code>, AUDIT_LOGIN_OTP_CODE=<code>}. 4. Re-dispatch the original task prompt LANE01-UZG-PLUS-V2-AUTHENTICATED-SCREENSHOTS-V1 verbatim. Cursor will re-run pre-flight, succeed at item 4, and proceed to capture pipeline. 5. Optional fallback if deterministic OTP cannot be provisioned: dispatch a manual-login variant where NTS performs login once locally on the Vultr server and Cursor scripts only the post-auth navigation+capture (cost: NTS clicks > 0; prefer deterministic path).
acceptance_criteria: Halt verdict accepted by CLA Lane_01 as the correct application of §4 Step A — no proceed permitted without credentials
Resolution path approved (deterministic OTP bypass preferred; manual-login fallback acceptable)
Test account provisioned with NTS_EMAIL strictly excluded per §13 item 5
Credentials added to C:\workspace\Uniton_Shared\.env.local NOT committed (verify .gitignore protects)
Task re-dispatched with the same task prompt; expected re-execution ~2-3h to PASS state
On re-dispatch, Cursor produces the originally-targeted ~100 authenticated screenshots + audit doc + DOT triplet + handoff
